message:
fix: tighten agent type inference to avoid false positives

- contains(".pi") matched .pip, .pipx, .pid etc — changed to
  contains("/.pi/") || ends_with("/.pi") for exact directory match
- contains("/amp") matched /amplify, /example etc — changed to
  contains("/amp/") || ends_with("/amp") for exact directory match

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
